prompt: Write a user story: As a user, I want to export my data so that I can use it in other tools.
assertions: The output does NOT use 'a user' as the persona
A named persona is used (either from product.local.md or a reasonable named alternative)
The skill flags that 'a user' is not acceptable and explains why
The 'so that' is improved to describe a user outcome, not just a system action
